# Pixo Studios

> Pixo Studios is a premium design and development studio based in India. We build high-converting websites, brand identities, e-commerce stores, and AI-powered digital products for ambitious businesses worldwide. Fast delivery, transparent pricing, no agency markup.

## What We Do

Pixo Studios offers end-to-end design and development services:

- **Landing Page Websites** — Single or multi-page marketing websites, mobile responsive, SEO optimized with WhatsApp integration and contact forms. For D2C brands, startups, and local businesses.
- **E-Commerce Websites** — Full shopping experience with cart, checkout, Razorpay/UPI payment integration, product management, and order tracking.
- **Brand Identity** — Logo design, color palette, typography, brand guidelines document, and social media templates.
- **UI/UX Design** — User research, wireframes, prototypes, high-fidelity Figma designs, and design system documentation for apps, dashboards, and SaaS.
- **MVP Development** — Full-stack web applications with user auth, payments, admin panel, cloud deployment, and CI/CD setup.
- **AI-Native Solutions** — Custom AI chatbots, workflow automation, and AI-powered features integrated into existing products.
- **Product Redesign** — Complete UX audit, modern redesign with improved performance, and migration to a modern tech stack.

## Pricing

- **Starter** — ₹25,000 per project. 1 Landing Page Design, Basic Brand Guidelines, Mobile Responsive, 2 Revisions, 7-day delivery.
- **Growth** — ₹75,000 per project. Multi-page Website, Brand Strategy Session, Web Animations, 4 Revisions, 14-day delivery.
- Custom enterprise pricing available.

## How We Work

1. **Discovery** — Business & audience research, competitor analysis, scope definition, strategic roadmap.
2. **Design** — Wireframes, prototypes, visual identity, feedback-driven iteration.
3. **Development** — Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS. Clean, performant, responsive code.
4. **Implementation** — Hosting, CI/CD, analytics, SEO, team training, documentation.
5. **Launch & Support** — Zero-downtime deployment, real-time monitoring, ongoing maintenance.

## Industries We Serve

E-Commerce & D2C, SaaS & Technology, Food & Restaurants, Real Estate, Education, Healthcare & Wellness, Fashion & Beauty, Coaching & Services.

## Technology Stack

Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Figma, Framer, Claude AI, Cursor, Midjourney. Built at the speed of AI.

## FAQ

**How long does a typical project take?**
A landing page takes 5-7 days. Full websites take 2-3 weeks. Product development runs 4-8 weeks.

**Do you work with startups or only large brands?**
Both. We love early-stage startups who need to move fast and look premium from day one.

**What's included in your design packages?**
Custom design (no templates), mobile responsiveness, SEO optimization, and post-launch support.

**Do you provide development too?**
Yes. Design, development, deployment — end-to-end. One studio, complete delivery.

**How do we start a project?**
Book a free 15-minute call. We discuss goals, timeline, budget. Proposal within 24 hours.

**Can you help with ongoing updates after launch?**
Every project includes 30 days of free support. Monthly retainers available for ongoing maintenance.
